name: Butterfinger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Two or more hours ahead, freeze the candy bars in their wrappers.
2. Crush the frozen Bars (still in wrappers) using a rolling pin.
3. Cream together butter and egg yolks until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar and vanilla to the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in Cool Whip until combined.
6. Layer half of the crumbled angel food cake into an 9x13 inch pan.
7. Spread half of the creamed mixture over the cake crumbs.
8. Sprinkle half of the crushed Butterfingers on top.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 with remaining layers.
10. Chill in the refrigerator for at least one hour before serving.
